title: hippuris vulgaris var. fluviatilis
intro: Hippuris vulgaris var. fluviatilis, also known as river avens or water avens, is a plant species in the family Hippuridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, particularly hippuric acid. The health benefits of Hippuris vulgaris var. fluviatilis include treating urinary tract issues, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of kidney stones and cystitis. Hippuris vulgaris var. fluviatilis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation and individual tolerance.
